task_completion.description: Verify the new category 'Editorial Picks' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Editorial Picks' in the WordPress Categories list or assigned to posts in the 'All Posts' view.

task_completion.description: Verify the first new post is scheduled with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the post titled 'Weekly News Roundup: Tech Industry Updates' in the 'All Posts' list. It should have the status 'Scheduled', the date '2026/01/15' at '9:00 am', and be assigned to the 'Editorial Picks' category.

task_completion.description: Verify the second new post is scheduled with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the post titled 'Interview: The Future of Digital Media' in the 'All Posts' list. It should have the status 'Scheduled', the date '2026/01/16' at '10:30 am', and be assigned to the 'Editorial Picks' category.

task_completion.description: Verify the third new post is scheduled with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the post titled 'Editorial: Why Open Source Matters' in the 'All Posts' list. It should have the status 'Scheduled', the date '2026/01/17' at '8:00 am', and be assigned to the 'News' category.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Getting Started with WordPress' post was updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Getting Started with WordPress' in the 'All Posts' list. It should have a 'Sticky' label next to its title or status, and its category should include 'Editorial Picks'.

task_completion.description: Verify the '10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs' post was changed to Draft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs' in the 'All Posts' list. Its status should clearly indicate 'Draft' instead of Published.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'The Art of Writing Engaging Blog Content' post was changed to Draft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'The Art of Writing Engaging Blog Content' in the 'All Posts' list. Its status should clearly indicate 'Draft' instead of Published.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin), not a terminal executing curl or WP-CLI commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The posts and categories should be visible within the WordPress UI, not just typed into a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not cheat by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL or SQLite commands directly updating the wp_posts or wp_terms tables.
